backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor file serving as the backend entry point for the Internet Computer canister.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting three high-confidence features related to hero section improvements (background image, text colors, visual hierarchy) all targeting HeroSection.tsx with associated test IDs REQ-6, REQ-7, and REQ-8.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend files describing a React-based laundry service website with warm earth tone styling, including components for hero, services, testimonials, gallery, and contact sections.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining a complete design system using OKLCH color space for light and dark modes, including primary, secondary, accent, and semantic colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with SEO meta tags for Coimbatore laundry services and Google Fonts preconnects for Playfair Display and Inter font families.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React application component composing the full single-page layout with header, seven content sections (Hero, Services, WhyChooseUs, HowItWorks, Testimonials, Gallery, Contact), and footer.
frontend/src/components/BrandMark.tsx: Reusable brand component rendering a 3D block-style logo image with tagline text, accepting optional className prop for styling flexibility.
frontend/src/components/sections/Contact: Contact section displaying business information in styled cards (phone, WhatsApp, location, hours) with icons and a CTA panel encouraging customer engagement.
frontend/src/components/sections/Gallery: Responsive gallery section with a 3-column grid displaying eight laundry service images with hover zoom effects and rounded corners.
frontend/src/components/sections/HeroSec: Hero section component with full-screen background image, gradient overlays, business headline, trust indicators, and CTA buttons for phone and WhatsApp contact.
frontend/src/components/sections/HowItWo: Displays a 4-step process grid explaining the service workflow from drop-off to collection with numbered steps and descriptions.
frontend/src/components/sections/Service: Grid layout showcasing five service offerings (steam ironing, dry cleaning, stain removal, darning, saree pleating) with icons and descriptions.
frontend/src/components/sections/Testimo: Three-column testimonial cards with customer quotes and author names, featuring quote icons and hover effects.
frontend/src/components/sections/WhyChoo: Grid of six benefit cards highlighting business advantages like fabric-safe process, saree expertise, and transparent pricing with icons.
frontend/src/components/SiteFooter.tsx: Footer component with three-column layout featuring BrandMark, quick navigation links with smooth scrolling, social media icons, copyright notice, and Caffeine.ai attribution with UTM tracking.
frontend/src/components/SiteHeader.tsx: Sticky header with scroll-based background transitions, BrandMark logo, responsive desktop/mobile navigation with smooth scrolling, and hamburger menu toggle for mobile devices.
frontend/src/content/siteContent.ts: Centralized content configuration file containing business info, hero text, services list, benefits, process steps, and testimonials for the dry cleaning business.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages backend actor instances with Internet Identity authentication, invalidating dependent queries on identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle with configurable options.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom design tokens for light/dark themes using warm color palette, typography settings, and utility classes for sections.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query client and Internet Identity provider, then renders the root App component.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining custom color schemes using OKLCH color space, typography with Playfair Display and Inter fonts, custom shadows, accordion animations, and responsive container settings.
project_state.json: Project state tracking visual design improvements for a laundry service website, focusing on hero section enhancements including a vibrant background image, text color harmonization, and improved visual hierarchy.
